Privacy

Everything stays on your device. Your progress, scores, streaks and settings live in your browser's local storage — nothing is uploaded anywhere, ever.

No accounts. No tracking. No ads. The game has no analytics, no cookies, no third-party scripts, and never asks for personal information.

Motion & vibration are used only for tilt steering and gameplay feedback, only while you play, and can be switched off in Settings.

Sharing is manual. Daily results and friend-challenge codes are only copied to your clipboard when you tap Share — you decide who sees them.

Deleting your data: Settings → Reset Save Data wipes everything. Uninstalling or clearing site data does the same.

How to Play

🛣️

1 · Drive

WASD/←↑↓→ to drive. Follow the GPS chevrons through traffic. Overtakes and close calls earn Style. Crashes earn dents and shame.

🚦

2 · Survive

Respect red lights, dodge cones, brake for pedestrians (they always film you). Every bonk, honk and curb-hop feeds the Shame Meter — at 100% you go viral and fail.

🅿️

3 · Park

At the destination, slot into the glowing spot: fully inside, within 8°, under 40cm from the curb — then hold still 1.5s. Nail it for the S rank.

Credits

🚗 Parking Nightmare 3D

A game about traffic, hubris, and the world's most judgmental sidewalks.

Design, code, art & every single "BONK" —
built with Claude

Driving instructor: a GPS that says "recalculating" in a disappointed tone

No pedestrians were harmed. Emotionally? Unclear.
